skills.name: Problem Statement
skills.purpose: Write a user-centered problem statement with who is blocked, what they are trying

skills.name: Problem Framing Canvas
skills.purpose: Guide teams through MITRE's Problem Framing Canvas
skills.when_to_use: When you need a clearer problem definition

skills.name: Epic Hypothesis
skills.purpose: Frame an epic as a testable hypothesis with target user, expected outcome

skills.name: Epic Breakdown Advisor
skills.purpose: Break down epics into user stories with Humanizing Work split patterns
skills.when_to_use: When breaking down large work items

skills.name: Positioning Statement
skills.purpose: Create a Geoffrey Moore-style positioning statement
skills.when_to_use: Clarifying who you serve and how

skills.name: Product Strategy Session
skills.purpose: Run an end-to-end product strategy session across positioning, discovery, roadmap

skills.name: Roadmap Planning
skills.purpose: Plan a strategic roadmap across prioritization, epic definition, stakeholder alignment

skills.name: Prioritization Advisor
skills.purpose: Choose a prioritization framework based on stage, team context, stakeholder needs

skills.name: Feature Investment Advisor
skills.purpose: Evaluate feature investments using revenue impact, cost structure, ROI
skills.when_to_use: Deciding whether to build a feature

skills.name: User Story
skills.purpose: Create user stories with Mike Cohn format and Gherkin acceptance criteria

skills.name: User Story Mapping
skills.purpose: Create a user story map that lays out activities, steps, tasks, release slices

skills.name: User Story Splitting
skills.purpose: Break a large story or epic into smaller deliverable stories

skills.name: Opportunity Solution Tree
skills.purpose: Build an Opportunity Solution Tree from outcomes to opportunities, solutions

skills.name: Pol Probe
skills.purpose: Define a Proof of Life probe to test a risky hypothesis cheaply
skills.when_to_use: When you need to test a hypothesis

skills.name: Pol Probe Advisor
skills.purpose: Select the right Proof of Life probe based on hypothesis, risk, resources

skills.name: Proto Persona
skills.purpose: Create a proto-persona from current research, market signals, team knowledge

skills.name: Company Research
skills.purpose: Create a company research brief with executive quotes, product strategy

skills.name: Market Research
skills.purpose: Conduct market research, competitive analysis, investor due diligence

skills.name: Competitive Analysis
skills.purpose: Create a competitive landscape analysis

skills.name: Prd Development
skills.purpose: Build a structured PRD that connects problem, users, solution, success criteria

skills.name: Press Release
skills.purpose: Write an Amazon-style press release that defines customer value before building

skills.name: Eol Message
skills.purpose: Write a clear, empathetic EOL announcement with rationale, customer impact

skills.name: Lean Ux Canvas
skills.purpose: Guide teams through Lean UX Canvas v2
skills.when_to_use: Framing a business problem, surfacing assumptions

skills.name: Recommendation Canvas
skills.purpose: Evaluate an AI product idea across outcomes, hypotheses, risks, positioning

skills.name: Pestel Analysis
skills.purpose: Analyze political, economic, social, technological, environmental, legal forces

skills.name: Storyboard
skills.purpose: Create a six-frame storyboard that shows a user's journey from problem to solution

skills.name: Workshop Facilitation
skills.purpose: Facilitate workshop sessions in a one-step, multi-turn flow
skills.when_to_use: When an interactive workshop is needed

skills.name: Altitude Horizon Framework
skills.purpose: Understand the PM-to-Director transition through altitude and horizon thinking

skills.name: Executive Onboarding Playbook
skills.purpose: Plan a VP or CPO 30-60-90 day diagnostic onboarding path

skills.name: Unified Build Resolver
skills.purpose: Universal build error resolution for all languages (C++, Go, Java, Kotlin, Rust, PyTorch)
skills.when_to_use: When build fails in any language - automatically detects language and applies fixes

skills.name: Language Agnostic TDD
skills.purpose: Enforce TDD workflow for any language - write tests first, then implement
skills.when_to_use: When implementing features or fixing bugs in any language

skills.name: Unified Coding Standards
skills.purpose: Universal coding standards and best practices across all languages
skills.when_to_use: When establishing or enforcing coding standards

skills.name: Workshop Facilitation
skills.purpose: Facilitate any workshop with templates for journey mapping, story mapping, positioning, etc.

skills.name: Instinct Manager
skills.purpose: Manage learned instincts - import, export, promote, prune
skills.when_to_use: When managing learned patterns and instincts

skills.name: PM Career Advisor
skills.purpose: Guide PM career transitions from IC to Director to VP/CPO
skills.when_to_use: When preparing for PM career advancement
